extortion.description: [AI generated] Eiffage S.A. is a French publicly-listed company established in 1993, specializing in civil engineering and construction. Its activities are divided into five main segments: Construction, Infrastructure, Real Estate Development, Metal, and Concessions & Energy. It is known for working on significant projects such as the Eiffel Tower and the Millau Viaduct. Eiffage operates not only in France but also in more than 50 countries worldwide.
